points.localStorageInfo: All data is saved in your localStorage (only for this demo).
points.noSessionRequired: No account or session required to explore.
points.limitedFeatures: Some advanced features might be disabled in this version.
points.privateData: Your data stays on your device and is never sent to our servers.

profile.title: Customize your profile
profile.desc: Create an account to upload a custom avatar, change your username, and sync your settings across all your devices.

drawer.title: Unlock full navigation
drawer.desc: The home, notifications, and search features are available for registered users. Join TaskFlow to organize your life effectively.

project.title: Manage multiple projects
project.desc: In this demo you can explore one project. Sign up to create unlimited projects, share them with teams, and use advanced filters.

add-members.title: Work Together
add-members.desc: Don't go it alone! Invite your friends or teammates and start collaborating in real-time. Create projects, assign tasks, and reach your goals together.

archive.title: History & Metrics
archive.desc: Take your productivity to the next level. By archiving tasks in the full version, you'll get access to detailed metrics, progress reports, and an unlimited history of your achievements.
